markdownRemark.html:
As salāmu ʿalaikum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh,

Please find attached information for the camping trip on the weekend of July 18th-20th @ Fitzroy Provincial Park, Fitzroy Ḥarbour, Ontario see the link for the map.

BarakAllāhu fīkum

frontmatter.title: Lecture on The Muslim's Stance In The Time Of Fitnah
